creator: johalun@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #1)

Hi

Some quick testing and emacs-devel seems to not have this problem. I'll continue to use it with global-auto-revert-mode enabled to see if the problem shows up again.

By the way, my world is from February and kernel is from a few days ago. Maybe I should update world and try again?
